scope: Evidence, rights, and independent-review work required before assessment, scoring, or an authoritative assessed-climate release. CT-40 separately permits the reviewed factual-display and magnitude-comparison tiers; this package grants no broader release authority.

routing_mismatches.detail: CT-14 accepts the BTR source family for official_inventory, while its CT-01 source-registry domains omit official_inventory.
routing_mismatches.required_resolution: Add the domain through reviewed source governance or remove BTR from the official-inventory route before acquisition.

snapshot_boundaries.reason: The adapter preserves the pinned batch attestation and source-registry decision for factual display and magnitude comparison while leaving field-level assessment reviews, assessment/scoring licence decisions, profiles, and release review absent.
The CT-14 checker pins zero inventories, four metadata-only audits, sixteen not-started audits, and pending source approvals.

required_next_compiler.name: reviewed production candidate compiler
required_next_compiler.rule: For assessment or scoring, consume new independently reviewed source decisions, document manifests, field-level fact reviews, profiles, and release review inputs; preserve CT-14 and the scoped CT-40 assessed-release DENY snapshot unchanged.

required: retain the pinned PRIMAP v2.6.1 checksum and CC BY 4.0 attribution
retain the CT-10C batch publication attestation and exact allowed-use flags
label values as harmonized economy-wide GHG facts without commitment, performance, or score claims
readiness_tracks.boundary: No target, commitment, delivery, performance, impact-band, or score claims.

required: explicit PRIMAP assessment-and-scoring rights decision tied to the exact checksum
2,060 CT-40 field-level fact-review records for any facts used by assessment
reviewed derived metrics and profiles with complete input lineage
independent release review on the assembled assessed candidate
readiness_tracks.boundary: The top-level CT-40 DENY applies here; it does not revoke the independently eligible factual tiers.

required: reviewed source-family and per-document rights decisions
latest official inventory package or explicit source-unavailable outcome for every country
latest active NDC package or independently reviewed absence/status determination for every country
comparability, delivery, and profile review using only eligible input facts
readiness_tracks.boundary: Scores remain withheld until all facts used by a profile also have scoring_approved rights decisions.

source_decision_work.purpose: Current 2,060-fact harmonized factual publication and future assessed-runtime input

factual_publication: pinned source-registry approval and licence evidence cover the exact release checksum
source-registry redistribution and normalized-values flags are true
batch publication attestation covers every released fact and exact allowed-use flag
attribution and transformation notice are retained
assessment_or_scoring: decision checksum pin matches every assessed fact
use_conditions.note: The factual conditions describe the already reviewed limited tier only. Assessment and scoring remain separate gate conditions, not approvals; the independent reviewer may deny or narrow those uses.

prohibited_basis: inference from public availability
acceptance of click-through terms by an agent
a metadata-only source-registry entry
a batch scientific attestation without a rights decision

attribution and transformation notice are retained
assessment_or_scoring: decision checksum pin matches every assessed fact

accepted_decision_basis: unchanged-document public-domain basis for source-file archiving

source_decision_work.routing_note: TER can corroborate or qualify an inventory but is not a substitute for the Party submission that supplies inventory values.

document_identity_manifest.checksum_rule: Every acquired file and attachment must have a SHA-256 over exact bytes; a locator or search index is not a checksum substitute.

required_artifact_roles: national inventory document or BTR inventory chapter
CRT/CTF/common reporting tables used for values
methodology and recalculation annexes used for interpretation
TER only when used as corroboration or conflict evidence
official_inventory_package.selection_rule: Use the latest official Party submission appropriate to the reporting obligation and retain older vintages needed to explain recalculations.

required_artifact_roles: superseded submissions needed for status history
ndc_and_target_package.absence_rule: No active target found is a reviewed result requiring current Party status and registry coverage; it must never be inferred from a failed download.

current_runtime_fact.checksum_rule: review.source_checksum_sha256 must equal the fact and source-decision checksum
current_runtime_fact.derivation_rule: A derivation review must include the output fact_id and every input_fact_id.

target_specific_paths: reference or BAU or intensity basis
target_and_inventory_fact.rule: Null, missing, withheld, and not-applicable values keep explicit evidence states and canonical reason codes.

profile.eligibility_rule: Every input fact must pass the assessment path, including scoring_approved rights.

release.independence_rule: reviewer_ids must be non-empty, unique, and exclude builder_id

review_roles.responsibility: Record official URLs, immutable identity metadata, exact bytes or fail-closed acquisition outcomes; makes no rights or scientific approval.
Independently verify publisher, latest/superseded status, document role, attachment completeness, and checksums.
Record the explicit rights decision for source files, normalized values, redistribution, and scoring; may approve, narrow, or deny.
Create draft observations and targets with locators, evidence states, and no inferred values.
Independently review every required fact field against the pinned source bytes and methodology.
Review target type, reference basis, scope alignment, transformations, and non-comparability reasons.
Compile candidate delivery/performance/profile outputs only from eligible facts.
Independently review inputs, method version, calculation hash, and output boundaries.
Assemble a new candidate without modifying denial snapshots.
Independently review the assembled release candidate and issue allow or deny; no earlier attestation grants this authority.

ordered_worklist.work: Preserve CT-14 and the scoped CT-40 tier decision as immutable audit evidence, including factual eligibility and assessed-release denial.
Complete the explicit PRIMAP assessment-and-scoring rights decision for the pinned v2.6.1 checksum; do not reopen or overstate the existing factual CC BY 4.0 decision.
Resolve UNFCCC source-family normalized-extraction and scoring rights with counsel, written clarification, or an explicitly licensed official interface.
Resolve the BTR official-inventory routing mismatch before using BTR values as inventory facts.
Acquire or fail-close exact official inventory and NDC artifact packages for all 20 countries; hash every acquired attachment.
Independently review document identity, current Party/submission status, rights exceptions, and checksums.

Produce and independently review field-level records for every fact used in assessment, plus any new official inventory and target fact reviews; do not misdescribe the existing batch factual-publication attestation as absent.
Compile and review target comparability and country profiles only from facts eligible for assessment/scoring.
Build a new reviewed release candidate and run CT-40; retain DENY if any condition remains unmet.
Only after an authentic allow: independently verify runtime manifest, release diff, deployment checks, and executable rollback proof.

prohibited_actions: infer reuse permission from public access
extend CT-42/CT-10C factual-publication attestations beyond factual display and magnitude comparison into commitment, derived metric, performance, score, profile, or assessed-release approval
promote an INDC to active NDC status
fill missing country fields from legacy pledge data
create a production runtime manifest or allow manifest from this package
